testcase.name: LoginErrorValidation

skipped.message: expected [Incorrect email or password.] but found [Incorrect email password.]

testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: LoginErrorValidation

failure.message: expected [Incorrect email or password.] but found [Incorrect email password.]

testcase.name: ProductErrorValidation

failure.message: Element <button class="btn btn-custom"> is not clickable at point (1024,133) because another element <div class="ngx-spinner-overlay ng-tns-c31-1 ng-trigger ng-trigger-fadeIn ng-star-inserted"> obscures it Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '22.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Command: [59a21fe7-249e-4cfd-802b-6ad38441f680, clickElement {id=523e8258-7e1a-4a1a-b7de-b322f431d20a}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, browserVersion: 150.0.1, moz:accessibilityChecks: false, moz:buildID: 20260427013024, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.36.0, moz:headless: false, moz:platformVersion: 10.0, moz:processID: 14628, moz:profile: C:\Users\LENOVO\AppData\Loc..., moz:shutdownTimeout: 60000, moz:webdriverClick: true, moz:windowless: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10....} Element: [[FirefoxDriver: firefox on windows (59a21fe7-249e-4cfd-802b-6ad38441f680)] -> css selector: [routerlink*='cart']] Session ID: 59a21fe7-249e-4cfd-802b-6ad38441f680
